title: Stairlift
abstract: A stairlift comprising a rail which is mounted along a staircase extending at at least one predetermined angle to the horizontal plane, and a frame engaging said rail and arranged to move along said rail in a transport direction having a vertical component and a horizontal component, on which frame a carrier is mounted for carrying a person, wherein the carrier is arranged to be moved relative to said frame by actuator means in a vertical plane extending along the horizontal component of the transport direction.
claims:
Claims Claims 1. A stairlift comprising a rail which is mounted along a staircase extending at at least one predetermined angle to the horizontal plane, and a frame engaging said rail and arranged to move along said rail in a transport direction having a vertical component and a horizontal component, on which frame a carrier is mounted for carrying a person, wherein the carrier is arranged to be moved relative to said frame by actuator means in a vertical plane extending along the horizontal component of the transport direction. 2. The stairlift in accordance with claim 1 or 2, wherein said frame is arranged to be moved relative to said frame in a direction in said vertical plane which is different than said transport direction. 3. The stairlift in accordance with claim 2, wherein said frame is arranged to be moved relative to said frame in the vertical direction. 4. The stairlift in accordance with claim 2 or 3, wherein said frame is arranged to be moved relative to said frame in the horizontal component of the transport direction. 5. The stairlift in accordance with any of the previous claims, wherein said staircase comprises at least two sections, each of said at least two sections extending at a different predetermined angle to the horizontal plane, and wherein said rail extends at one common predetermined angle to the horizontal plane along said at least two sections, and wherein said carrier is arranged to be moved relative to said frame in said plane while said frame is being moved along said rail in at least on of said sections. 6. The stairlift in accordance with any of the previous claims, wherein said carrier is arranged to be moved relative to said frame in such a manner that the vertical distance between the frame and the staircase is kept below a predetermined maximum distance. 7. The stairlift in accordance with any of the previous claims, wherein the staircase comprises at least one flight section having steps and at least one floor or landing section adjacent to said flight section. 8. The stairlift in accordance claim 7, wherein said carrier is arranged to be moved in the vertical direction relative to said frame during standstill in said floor or landing section, such that 

 the vertical distance between the carrier and the floor or landing section becomes smaller than the vertical distance between the carrier and the steps in the flight section. 9. The stairlift in accordance claim 7 or 8, wherein said carrier is arranged to be moved in the opposite horizontal component of the transport direction relative to said frame while said frame is moving in the transport direction in said floor or landing section, such that the vertical distance between the carrier and the floor or landing section becomes smaller than the vertical distance between the carrier and the steps in the flight section. 10. The stairlift in accordance with any of the previous claims, wherein said carrier is arranged to be rotated around a vertical axis. 11. The stairlift in accordance with claim 10, wherein said carrier is arranged to be rotated around said vertical axis above said at least one floor or landing section. 12. The stairlift in accordance with any of the previous claims, wherein said carrier comprises a chair, a seat, a footrest and/or a platform arranged to carry a wheelchair. 13. The stairlift in accordance with any of the previous claims, wherein said actuator means is programmed to move said carrier relative to said frame in a predetermined manner in dependence of the position of the frame along said rail. 14. The stairlift in accordance with any of the previous claims, wherein said rail is comprised of a single tube extending along said staircase or of a double tube extending along said staircase. 15. The stairlift in accordance with any of the previous claims, wherein said carrier is mounted on said frame by means of a linear actuator which allows movement of the carrier relative to the frame in one direction in said plane. 16. Method for moving a carrier carrying a person along a staircase, wherein a rail is mounted along a staircase extending at at least one predetermined angle to the horizontal plane, wherein a frame engages said rail and moves along said rail in a transport direction having a vertical component and a horizontal component, wherein the carrier is mounted on a frame, wherein the carrier is moved relative to said frame by actuator means in a vertical plane extending along the horizontal component of the transport direction. 17. A stairlift assembly arranged to be used in a stairlift in accordance with any of the previous claims 1 - 15 and/or arranged to be used in the method in accordance with claim 16, said assembly comprising a frame, a carrier for carrying a person and actuator means, wherein said frame is arranged to engage said rail and arranged to move along said rail in said transport direction, on which frame said carrier is mounted, and wherein the carrier is arranged to be moved relative to said frame by said actuator means in a vertical plane extending along the horizontal component of the transport direction.
